p.em: Optimization: Reducing Atomic Operations via Intra-Warp Communication

div.p: State: Each thread has calculated its target histogram bin. Redundancy: 5 threads (0,1,3,5,6) want to update bin[5].
Mechanism: Hardware compares registers across warp. Result: All threads sharing bin: 5 receive the same bitmask.
ffs: Find First Set bit selects the lowest index thread to act as the aggregator for the group.
Aggregation: The leader calculates how many threads are in its group to perform a single weighted atomic.
Optimization: Instead of 5 atomics of +1, we perform 1 atomic of +5.
